# DMWeb Dungeon Master main reference

External reference only. This records stable metadata from the Dungeon Master Encyclopaedia main Dungeon Master page. It may be used for source/reference triage, but it is not runtime parity proof without verification against canonical original assets, ReDMCSB source, or debugger traces.

## Source

- URL: http://dmweb.free.fr/games/dungeon-master/
- Fetched: 2026-05-06
- Page title: Dungeon Master - Games - Dungeon Master Encyclopaedia

## Extracted facts useful for Firestaff

- Dungeon Master was initially released on Atari ST on 1987-12-15.
- Development platform was Atari ST; the page says it was developed in Megamax C with much graphics code in assembly.
- Ports mentioned include Apple IIGS, Amiga, PC, SNES, X68000, PC-9801, and FM-Towns.
- The page explicitly says: "The Dungeon Master reference information you will find on this site comes from the PC version of Dungeon Master."
- PC UK Psygnosis release date listed on the page: 1992-07-28.

## Firestaff use

- Treat this as a strong external anchor that DMWeb reference pages are PC-version-oriented.
- Useful for PC34/manual/Retrogames triangulation and for identifying whether a DMWeb detail is likely PC-port behavior.
- Do not use this page alone to claim DM1 V1 runtime parity. PC-version claims still need canonical asset checks and/or runtime debugger confirmation.

## Related local/canonical anchors

N2 canonical DM1 anchors are under:

- <firestaff-original-games>/_canonical/dm1/

Known anchors include PC34 folders, TITLE, GRAPHICS.DAT, DUNGEON.DAT, and archived DOS releases documented in the canonical README.
